label: agent channels • send without confirm_send fails before provider dispatch
query: deterministic policy pin — no model involved
notes: The no-unapproved-send gate: agent_channel_send_message against a writable destination with confirm_send false/omitted must fail with invalid-args BEFORE the provider client is invoked — the fake client's sent-message counter must stay at zero. A confirmed send afterwards proves the gate (not a broken pipe) was the reason. CI-safe: fake clients, isolated stores, no network, no model.
